text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I thought today would be the day, and I gave our
training sessions all I had...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
choice_data_list: Don't let yourself lose the mental game!
Don't let yourself lose the mental game!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
choice_data_list: Don't let yourself lose the mental game!
Don't let yourself lose the mental game!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Yeah... Yeah! Thank you so much! Hearing you say that gives me strength.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I almost forgot. My dream's not just my dream
anymore.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
All right, time to snap out of this funk! Let's keep
at it—starting tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
...You're totally right. If I give up now, then I'm
really done for!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I love races, and I'll never let go of my dream to
win! Today's the start of working even harder for
first place!
